# MCP tools integration tests
# Tests integration between different MCP tools

# Set test environment
env MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT=10s

# Test mcpspy tool integration
exec bash -c 'echo "{\"jsonrpc\": \"2.0\", \"id\": 1, \"method\": \"test\"}" | mcpspy --pretty'
stdout '"jsonrpc": "2.0"'
stdout '"method": "test"'

# Test mcpdiff tool integration
exec bash -c 'echo "mcp-send {\"jsonrpc\": \"2.0\", \"id\": 1, \"method\": \"test1\"} # 1000.000" > test1.mcp'
exec bash -c 'echo "mcp-send {\"jsonrpc\": \"2.0\", \"id\": 1, \"method\": \"test2\"} # 1000.000" > test2.mcp'
exec mcpdiff test1.mcp test2.mcp
stdout 'test1'
stdout 'test2'

# Cleanup
exec rm -f test1.mcp test2.mcp
